summary: Hand-authored entity-normalization subsystem: `normalize` (+ `stats`, `recommend`) canonicalizes free-text ticket-type and venue names into structured axes in a parallel, re-runnable local store.
reason: The generator emits only spec-driven resource commands; DICE's manually-entered ticket-type and venue strings need canonicalization to power cross-event joins and `revenue summary --by-axis`. None of this is derivable from the GraphQL spec.
notes: Parallel and re-runnable: raw synced data is never modified and resolved mappings stay local. `normalize` is intentionally NOT annotated mcp:read-only (it writes the local store); `normalize stats` is read-only and carries the annotation. `normalize recommend` profiles the store and emits a starter config. Read-only annotation discipline confirmed during the 2026-05-27 MCP audit. API-specific value-add, not a generator gap.
